info.title: RWA Backend API
info.description: API documentation for the RWA graduation project - Real World Assets Platform

sources.description: Optional provider subset to sync. Empty means all enabled providers.

action.description: Relation action to apply to the target user

referenceCode.description: Reference code to set for the user

dob.description: Date of birth in ISO format

idFrontImg.description: Front-side image URL of identity document

idBackImg.description: Back-side image URL of identity document

selfieImg.description: Selfie image URL for identity verification

reason.description: Reason for rejecting a KYC submission
reason.example: Uploaded documents are blurry and unreadable

idempotencyKey.description: Client-generated UUID to prevent duplicate submissions

amount.description: Amount to transfer as a string

toUserEmail.description: Recipient user email, used for validation only

idempotencyKey.description: Client-generated UUID to prevent duplicate submissions
Idempotency key to prevent double execution

destinationWallet.description: Destination wallet address to sweep funds to

privateKey.description: Private key of the admin wallet used for sweeping

orderIds.description: Array of order IDs to cancel

cancel.description: Set to true to cancel the order. If true, other fields are ignored

price.description: New limit/stop price. Only applicable for non-MARKET orders

stopLossPrice.description: New stop loss price. Optional, set to null to remove

takeProfitPrice.description: New take profit price. Optional, set to null to remove

side.description: Order side: 0 for long, 1 for short

quantity.description: Order quantity. Must be within asset min/max trade size

orderType.description: Order type: 0 for market, 1 for limit, 2 for stop

price.description: Limit/Stop price (required for LIMIT/STOP orders, ignored for MARKET)

status.description: Ticket status. 0 = OPEN, 1 = IN_PROGRESS, 2 = RESOLVED, 3 = CLOSED

priority.description: Ticket priority. 0 = LOW, 1 = MEDIUM, 2 = HIGH, 3 = URGENT

email.description: User email address. Required when register or reset password
User email address. Required when register or reset password

password.description: Register password (min 8 chars, mixed case, number, special char)

idToken.description: ID token from social provider (React Native app)

newPassword.description: New password (min 8 chars, mixed case, number, special char)
New password (min 8 chars, mixed case, number, special char)

snapshotDate.description: Snapshot date/time. Defaults to immediate execution if omitted.

type.description: Media type attached to the post

link.description: Public URL of the media resource

linksUrl.description: Optional list of images/videos attached to the post

assetIds.description: Optional list of tagged CFD asset identifiers

positionIds.description: Array of position IDs to close

stopLossPrice.description: New stop loss price. Optional, set to null to remove

takeProfitPrice.description: New take profit price. Optional, set to null to remove

errors.description: Detailed error information by field, domain rule, or external provider.

traceId.description: Request trace id for debugging across services.

BadRequest.description: Malformed request payload or failed domain validation.

Unauthorized.description: Authentication is missing, invalid, revoked, or expired.

Forbidden.description: Authenticated but not allowed to access or mutate this resource.

TooManyRequests.description: Rate limit exceeded or too many OTP/password attempts.

InternalServerError.description: Unexpected server error or upstream dependency failure.
